case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. VS. ARMANDO LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED OCT-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINITFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERGIO HERNANDEZ, COLLECTIONS. DEFENDANT ARMANDO LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,367.60 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO $2,367.60 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,477.60, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO A LOAN AGREEMENT AND BECAME DELINQUENT, RESULTING IN THE BALANCE DUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $379.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC.
